_meta.name: p22
_meta.method: Central saturated-core centroid, warm-index parhelion centroids, and visual confirmation against 22-degree halo diagnostic overlay.
_meta.status: belt-y FF anchor; do not treat as a new inversion-route verdict
_meta.note: Strong bilateral low-sun parhelia and a clean horizontal belt. Current -0.05*R22 belt rule lands directly on the observed belt.

r22_source_note: Per audit memo §3 first dropped item: 'p22 shows a clearly visible 22° halo arc connecting the parhelia (central region is sun-glare-washed but the upper arc is unambiguous). The R22 on p22 is plausibly fittable from the visible upper arc.' Pass B1 classification 2026-05-13; lever sec(h)-1 = 0.50%, anchor-noise-bounded — clean residual is informational, not route-validating. Eligible with low-lever caveat.
